name: Grid Expand
description: A clicked grid item's image morphs seamlessly into the detail page hero. The image moves and scales into place while the rest of the page crossfades — ideal for product grids, image galleries, and card-based layouts.
demoAnimations: @keyframes ge-item-expand { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; z-index: 10; } 100% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; z-index: 10; } } @keyframes ge-grid-fade { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @keyframes ge-detail-enter { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.92); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } @keyframes ge-detail-exit { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.92); } } .ge-item-expand { animation: ge-item-expand 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1) forwards; } .ge-grid-fade { animation: ge-grid-fade 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1) forwards; } .ge-detail-enter { animation: ge-detail-enter 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1) forwards; } .ge-detail-exit { animation: ge-detail-exit 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1) forwards; }

files.content:
export { GridExpandLink } from "./link"
export { GridExpandTarget } from "./target"
